structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-11-25 Lendsure Expands to Include Ground-Up Construction for Investment Properties
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-11-25 14:11:39-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Lendsure has expanded their offerings to include ground-up construction financing, a valuable enhancement designed specifically for builders. This new offering will broaden the opportunities available to NOVA’s Production Team and will help facilitate relationships with builder partners. In addition, Lendsure continues to offer its Fix n’ Flip program, enabling investors to renovate properties within an efficient timeline and maximize their capital. 

Channel: Brokered

Product Type: Construction/ Fix n’ Flip

 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EqGgVNXmpKxJsgFsNL8rxbIBJrXNBmZNDm1Ij5vnzUKksQ?e=5UZYNZ> 

 Training <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EjNahReNbN1FhFZ03AaX5ZQBZQEuIPW6udOi4nOKhW6s9g?e=Cam0Nn> 

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	SFR, 2-4 units, Condo, Townhomes, PUD
*	Loan amounts >$150k<$1MM
*	Only available for investment properties

Ground-up Construction

*	Builder must have successfully completed three new builds or a mix of two builds and a major renovation >$200k to qualify. 
*	680+ FICO
*	12 and 18-month terms options with interest only payments
*	Loan amounts up to 60% of the lot cost and 85% of the construction cost
*	Loan origination fees can be financed into the loan
*	No income documentation needed to qualify (conditions apply)

Fix n’ Flip

*	Any level of investor experience permitted
*	660+ FICO
*	12-month loan term with interest only payments
*	Total loan amount up to 90% of total cost

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	AE for Ground-Up Construction program/ Fix n’ Flip: 

	*	Lori Williams; LWilliams@lendsure.com <mailto:LWilliams@lendsure.com> ; 858-207-4843

*	Compensation: 102.25 (subject to splits)

ATTACHMENTS

*	Marketing 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us:

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
